SEARCH
Package com.krishcpatel.realm.skills.listener

Class SkillsActionListener

java.lang.Object
com.krishcpatel.realm.skills.listener.SkillsActionListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.bukkit.event.Listener
public final class SkillsActionListener extends Object implements org.bukkit.event.Listener
Converts Bukkit actions into normalized skill actions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SkillsActionListener(Core core, SkillProgressService progress)
    Creates the skill action listener.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onAnvilUse(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
    Handles anvil result usage for the repair skill.
    void
    onBlockBreak(org.bukkit.event.block.BlockBreakEvent event)
    Handles block breaking actions for gathering skills.
    void
    onBrew(org.bukkit.event.inventory.BrewEvent event)
    Handles completed brew actions for the alchemy skill.
    void
    onBrewingInventoryClick(org.bukkit.event.inventory.InventoryClickEvent event)
    Tracks the last brewing stand user to attribute brew completion to a player.
    void
    onEntityDamage(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageByEntityEvent event)
    Handles player combat and projectile damage actions for combat skills.
    void
    onFallDamage(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityDamageEvent event)
    Handles acrobatics xp on fall damage and successful roll outcomes.
    void
    onFish(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerFishEvent event)
    Handles successful fishing catches for the fishing skill.
    void
    onTame(org.bukkit.event.entity.EntityTameEvent event)
    Handles successful taming for the taming skill.
